scene_summary.scene_description: G3 Beijing-Taiwan Expressway (K3+303, upstream south direction) captured from an overhead gantry camera. The highway has dual carriageways separated by green anti-glare barriers. Left carriageway has 3 lanes plus emergency lane with vehicles moving toward bottom of frame (southbound). Right carriageway has 3 lanes plus emergency lane with vehicles moving toward top of frame (northbound). A white car is stopped on the left emergency lane with trunk open, appearing to be a breakdown or emergency stop. Other vehicles include sedans and a box truck traveling at normal speed. Clear sunny day with good visibility. Timestamp shows 2026-04-01 14:38:48-14:38:55.

Without evidence of a non-emergency situation or extended parking violation, this does not meet the criteria for illegal parking.
